report.title: 员工存款凭证业绩明细

select.value:
SELECT A.VUCH_NBR ,left(A.VUCH_NBR,4)||'****'||right(A.VUCH_NBR,4) as VUCH_NBR_STR ,A.EMP_ID ,A.EMP_NM ,A.MEASURE_DT ,A.CST_ID ,A.CST_NM ,A.PSTN_TYPE ,A.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,A.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,A.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,A.VUCH_TYPE_ID ,A.VUCH_TYPE_NM ,A.BIZ_TYPE_ID ,bz.BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW ,A.ORG_ID ,A.ORG_NM ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.VUCH_STATUS_ID ,A.VUCH_STATUS_NM ,A.RATIO ,A.CCY_ID ,A.LN_AMT ,A.BAL ,A.MTD_AVG_BAL ,A.QTD_AVG_BAL ,A.YTD_AVG_BAL ,A.VUCH_YTD_AVG_BAL ,A.Q_PROFIT ,A.Y_PROFIT ,A.ACT_Q_PROFIT ,A.ACT_Y_PROFIT
,A.CLAIM_DT ,A.BIZ_TP_CD ,tp.BIZ_TP_NM ,A.NEW_OR_EXIST ,A.RISK_FLAG ,b.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,emp.ORG_NM as EMP_ORG_NM ,emp.BRANCH_ORG_NM as EMP_BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_VUCH_PROFIT_DETAIL A %SQL% inner JOIN IBS.T5_ORG B ON emp.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND B.ORG_TYPE_ID = 'EO' inner join IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE bz on bz.BIZ_TYPE_ID=A.BIZ_TYPE_ID left join pub.BIZ_TP tp on tp.BIZ_TP_CD=A.BIZ_TP_CD WHERE {#condition#} and A.VUCH_TYPE_ID<>'21' and A.EMP_ID not like '1%' order by b.BRANCH_ORG_ID,emp.ORG_ID,A.EMP_ID, A.OPEN_DT desc,A.VUCH_NBR

option.source: @{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from ibs.T9_PSTN_TYPE order by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from ibs.T9_PSTN_TYPE where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID,BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') and BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and (HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW from IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE where BIZ_TYPE_CGY = '存款' order by BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW}
option.label: BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW

report.footer:
提示
1.本系统币种为本外币合计。
2.数据量过大，请进行信息筛选后导出。
